extracted.notes: declaredTotal is INAC revenue per financial statements as shown on INAC reconciliation page (band number 729). Total summary revenue across all funds was 1021257. The balance sheet includes investments of 509970 and trust moneys of 1132 in addition to current assets and capital assets. Long-term liabilities not separately stated; deferred revenue of 45000 and loan payable of 26403 are included in current liabilities total of 100098. Health and Welfare revenue sourced from Carrier Sekani Family Services (103896), not INAC. Human Resources Development Canada revenue sourced from Prince George Nechako Aboriginal Employment and Training Association (65730), not INAC directly.
